     The Numbers Business Report

Cats (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $27,166,770Details
International Box Office $48,131,706
Worldwide Box Office $75,298,476
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,043,338
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,378,736
Total $3,422,074
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Over the course of a single night, a tribe of cats called the Jellicles make what is known as “the Jellicle choice” and decide which cat will ascend to the Heaviside Layer and come back to a new life.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,619,870 (24.4% of total gross)
Legs:4.10 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,380 opening theaters/3,380 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,450,552

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2019 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: December 17th, 2019 (Wide) (Hungary)
December 20th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 24th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
December 25th, 2019 (Wide) (Mexico)
December 25th, 2019 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: March 17th, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some rude and suggestive humor. NOTE: EDITED FOR RE-RATE. CONTENT IS DIFFERENT FROM "PG" RATED VERSION, BULLETIN NO. 2607 (12/04/2019). ONLY THIS EDITED VERSION IS RATED. NO CHANGE IN RATING OR RATING DESCRIPTOR.
(Rating bulletin 2610 (Cert #52490), 12/25/2019)
Running Time: 110 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Ensemble, Famously Bad
Plot point: One Night, Reincarnation, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Epic Musical
Source:Based on Musical or Opera
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Working Title Films, Monumental Pictures, The Really Useful Group, Universal Pictures, Amblin Entertainment, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
